name: remove_attachments
trigger_description:
Use this tool when:
The user asks to remove, delete, or replace attachments on an existing draft.
The user indicates that a specific file should not be included before sending.
The assistant must remove an attachment prior to sending.

Do not use this tool when:
Editing draft body, subject, or recipients (use update_draft).
Adding attachments (use add_attachments).
Creating a new draft (use create_draft).
Sending the email (use send_draft).

If the user does not specify which attachment to remove, retrieve the draft first and ask for clarification.
